_logger.LogInformation(
    "DIA Dataverse staging save attempt {Attempt} of {MaxAttempts} started for file {FileName}.",
    attempt,
    maxAttempts,
    filename);

var forceStagingFailure =
    Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable("ForceDiaStagingFailure") == "true";

if (forceStagingFailure)
{
    throw new Exception("Temporary DEV validation: forced DIA staging save failure.");
}

var deStagingRecord = new icow_deceasedestatestaging();
